data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of syncing back to the main booking system, but the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations related to this specific functionality. The linked use case mentions the need for this sync, yet the prior steps do not demonstrate that this requirement has been fulfilled. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence regarding this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of syncing back to the main booking system.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
